chunks.text: Technical Reports - 1983. PUBLISHING: A Reliable Broadcast Communication Mechanism (CSD-83-165) by David Leo Presotto. Queries and Views of Programs Using a Relational Database System (CSD-83-164) by Mark A. Linton. Foderaro. Implementation of Network Primitives for a Network Monitor/Debugger (CSD-83-159) by Brendan A. Voge. A Family of Simplex Variants Solving An m x d Linear Program in Expected Number of Pivot Steps Depending on d Only (CSD-83-157) by Ilan Adler, Richard Karp and Ron Shamir. On the Modeling of Shared Resources by Queuing Networks with Serialization Delays (CSD-83-153) by Anna Hac. chunks.question: What is the main content of the 1983 technical reports list?
chunks.answer: List of technical reports with titles and authors.
